name: io.github.dr-deploy/drdeploy-mcp
title: Dr.Deploy
description: Live monitor for shipped websites. Exposes scan / list_sites / get_findings / get_status as MCP tools so AI editors can audit a deployed site for leaked API keys, broken og:image, missing favicons, exposed .env files, security header gaps, and SEO regressions.

environmentVariables.name: DRDEPLOY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the drdeploy API. Get one by signing up at https://drdeploy.dev and running `drdeploy login` (or via the dashboard at https://drdeploy.dev/integrations/api).

environmentVariables.name: DRDEPLOY_API_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Override the API host. Defaults to https://drdeploy.dev.
